hero.title: At The Jordanian Center for Hearing, Speech, and Occupational Therapy,
hero.subtitle: we help children and adults overcome hearing, speech, and sensory challenges — so every person can communicate clearly and live independently.

services.heading: Our Services
services.description: JHSM provides a large scale of services to the society due to the multiplicity of specialties in our center. Our clinics work together to improve each client's quality of life through personalized care.

hearing.title: Hearing and Their Treatments
hearing.desc: Advanced hearing assessment, diagnosis, device fitting, and treatment planning for children and adults.

speech.title: Speech and its Treatment
speech.desc: Personalized speech therapy for language delay, articulation, fluency, and communication development.

occupational.title: Occupational Therapy
occupational.desc: Therapy programs that build sensory, motor, and daily living skills through meaningful activities.

about.heading: About Us
about.description: We work with families, schools, and specialists to support every patient's progress — not just during sessions. Our goal is for every person we treat to hear clearly, speak confidently, and take part fully in daily life.

team.heading: Our Main Team
team.description: Our audiologists, speech therapists, and occupational therapists work together on every case — building each treatment plan around clinical assessment, not guesswork.

blog.heading: Our Blogs
blog.description: Read practical guides on hearing health, speech development, and therapy tips you can use at home.

footer.rights: © 2024 Jordan Hearing & Speech Therapy. All Rights Reserved.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Hearing evaluation, speech therapy, occupational therapy, hearing aid fitting.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with Jordan Hearing & Speech Therapy in Amman.

contact.heading: Let's get in touch!
contact.subject: Subject
contact.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy
contact.successMsg: Thank you, we will be in touch soon.

evaluation.heading: Hearing Evaluation
evaluation.subtext: Answer the following questions for a preliminary hearing assessment
evaluation.resultMild: You may have mild hearing difficulty
evaluation.resultModerate: A specialist hearing evaluation is recommended
evaluation.resultSevere: An urgent visit to a hearing specialist is recommended
